2399480.name: Parcat
2399480.description:
Sometimes you have to break time to find love.

Become an ordinary cat in an extraordinary mess.

Your favorite blanket is gone. The store’s on fire. And your beloved cat-friend has vanished through the window.

Armed with nothing but curiosity, claws, and questionable physics skills, you’ll parkour across rooftops, knock over everything that stands, and slowly piece together a time machine hidden in your basement.

Jump, climb, swing, and meow your way through a world where every object can be moved, broken, or used to reach the impossible.

Collect fragments of memory to travel back into key moments of the past — and maybe, just maybe, fix the one thing that truly mattered.

🐈 Features

• Full-body cat physics. Push, drag, swing, and break your surroundings.

• Cinematic parkour. Run, climb, and swing like a feline acrobat.

• Time-travel puzzles. Gather memory fragments to revisit the past.
2399480.supported_languages:
英语*, 俄语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
